intro: Kleinia shevaroyensis is a plant species commonly known as the Shevaroy Mountain Kleinia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Kleinia shevaroyensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Kleinia shevaroyensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into Ayurvedic formulations and supplements to promote overall well-being.
